_comment: Tiered MCP server registry for the enterprise SDLC pipeline. Enable only what your project needs. ALL credentials come from environment variables — never inline them here. Comment out (remove) any server you don't use. See ./README.md for tiers, auth, and security guidance, and docs/07-mcp.md for the full rationale + decision matrix.

filesystem._why: Scoped file access beyond the project root when needed (monorepo siblings, shared design docs).

git._why: Structured git history/blame/diff for bug-investigator and code-reviewer without shelling out.

github._why: PRs, issues, reviews, checks. Used by release-manager, code-reviewer, product-manager. Swap for a GitLab server if you use GitLab.

postgres._why: Read-only schema introspection + query planning for database-engineer/performance-engineer. USE A READ-ONLY ROLE.

security-scanner._why: Semgrep MCP for on-demand SAST queries by security-reviewer (complements the vuln-scan CI gate).

docker._why: Container/image inspection for devops-engineer & infrastructure-engineer. Grants control of the Docker daemon — restrict.
